Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add pre-rendered PNG dialog embedding and cursor variants

Replace shape-layer dialog construction (6-7 layers, ~25 API calls each)
with pre-rendered PNG imports (2 layers, ~3 API calls each). 36 dialog
images cover all variant/icon combinations with pixel-perfect title bar
gradients. Cursor elements now support arrow and hand variants via
embedded PNG assets.

- Add PIL renderer (tools/render_dialogs.py) and 36-entry catalog
- Embed base64 PNG data in JSX with b64decode/importEmbeddedPNG helpers
- Rewrite buildDialogBox and buildCursor to use footage imports
- Add catalogId and cursorVariant fields to scheduler
- Enhance clearEffect to clean up imported footage and cached PNGs
- Remove dialog custom messages from UI (text baked into PNGs)
- Update README for freeze strips, pre-rendered dialogs, cursor variants
- Add 561 new scheduler tests (1885 total, all passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(updater): hide console window on Windows

Add windowsHide: true option to spawn calls to prevent
command windows from stealing focus during updates.

commit.message:
fix(ajarkan): handle GPT returning category/subcategory format slugs

Root cause: GPT-4o-mini returns subcategory slugs as "aqidah/siapa-allah"
instead of just "siapa-allah". The slash-prefixed format wasn't recognized
by the validation set, causing all freeform searches to fail.

Fix: Strip category prefix when slug contains "/" before validation.
Also remove temporary debug output fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(security): let credential messages through to LLM, redact in history only

Previously, messages containing credential patterns were blocked entirely
with a warning. Now the message reaches the LLM (so user can set API keys
via chat) but credentials are redacted from stored conversation history.

v0.27.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(ui): context menu send-to-top/bottom with undo support (PUNT-306) (#364)

## Summary
- Adds a **Move** submenu to the ticket context menu with Top/Bottom
positioning for backlog, sprint, and board views
- Board view shows column name + status icon; list views show sprint
(with status color) and backlog sections in fixed order
- Backlog reordering updates `backlogOrder` only (matching drag
behavior), sprint/board updates only moved tickets' order values
- Scroll position preserved in backlog via `useLayoutEffect` +
`scroll-behavior: auto` override
- Full undo/redo support via new `backlogReorder` action type for
backlog, existing actions for sprint/board

## Test plan
- [ ] Right-click ticket in backlog ‚Üí Move ‚Üí Top/Bottom works, scroll
stays in place
- [ ] Right-click ticket in sprint ‚Üí Move ‚Üí Top/Bottom works
- [ ] Right-click ticket in board ‚Üí Move shows column header with icon,
Top/Bottom works
- [ ] Cross-list moves (backlog ‚Üî sprint) position correctly
- [ ] Multi-select + Move preserves relative order
- [ ] Ctrl+Z undoes backlog reorder, Ctrl+Y redoes it
- [ ] Ctrl+Z undoes sprint/board reorder (only moved tickets, not entire
list)
- [ ] Sprint header shows green dot (active) or blue dot (planning)
- [ ] Backlog sort cleared when using send-to-position

ü§ñ Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: resolve critical issues across DDL-Entity alignment, auth, jobs, and frontend

- Align init-db.sql and seed-data.sql table names with TypeORM Entity decorators (singular -> plural)
- Remove insecure JWT_SECRET default fallback, use getOrThrow() to require env var
- Create JobsModule with ScheduleModule.forRoot() and proper entity class references
- Fix job files to import entity classes instead of string tokens
- Register JobsModule in AppModule
- Add @nestjs/schedule dependency
- Fix recommendation controller route ordering (sku/:skuId before :id)
- Fix database.config.ts parseInt type error
- Add standalone output and transpilePackages to next.config.ts
- Fix jest.config.ts invalid import and config key
- Fix detail pages (alerts/[id], actions/[id]) to read from Zustand stores
- Sync frontend AlertType enum with backend (add MARGIN_BREACH, PRICE_WAR)
- Add frontend directory to git (was untracked submodule)
- Install supertest types for e2e tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: linker converts hostDirectives to …µ…µHostDirectivesFeature in features array (#78)

The linker was emitting `hostDirectives` as a direct property on
`defineDirective`/`defineComponent`, but the Angular runtime only
processes it via `…µ…µHostDirectivesFeature` in the `features` array.
This caused host directives to be silently dropped at runtime.

- Fix: https://github.com/voidzero-dev/oxc-angular-compiler/issues/71

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: replace manual DTO interfaces with auto-generated types to prevent field-dropping bugs

Eliminates the class of bug where hand-written transform functions
cherry-pick fields from DTOs and silently drop new or existing fields.

Changes:
- EventTicketType now uses auto-generated TicketTypeDto directly
- Removed duplicate EventTicketType interface from TicketTypeFormModal
- Removed sessionsIncluded/sessionIdentifiers field name mismatch
- Removed unused description and allowMultiplePurchase fields
- Replaced field-picking transforms with spread operator in:
  - useEvents.ts (ticket type transform)
  - eventDataTransformation.ts (session and ticket type mappings)
  - eventSessionConversion.ts (ticket type conversion)
- Removed ApiEventTicketType manual interface from useEvents.ts
- Simplified UpdateEventDto to use TicketTypeDto directly
- Removed convertTicketTypeForModal bridge function from EventForm

Net result: -200 lines, 3 duplicate interfaces eliminated, all DTO fields
now flow through automatically from backend to frontend.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Validate block_size/chunk_size and fix inclusive range overflow

- Assert block_size > 0 in Cache, RouterServer, and CacheClientBuilder
  to prevent division-by-zero panics on misconfiguration
- Assert chunk_size > 0 in CacheServer to prevent infinite streams
- Use checked_add for inclusive range end bound (..=u64::MAX) to avoid
  overflow; treats it as unbounded instead of panicking

commit.message:
chore: bump version to v1.3.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: WDM Kernel Streaming diagnostic ‚Äî how deep can user mode go?

Explores the KS filter layer below WASAPI from user mode. Enumerates
HDA filter graph, inspects pins/formats/instances, creates WaveRT pin
instances. Hits the wall at DMA buffer allocation (kernel-mode PortCls
interface only). Documents the exact boundary between user-mode and
kernel-mode audio on modern Windows.

Key finding: WASAPI exclusive IS the user-mode floor for WaveRT audio.
Going lower requires a kernel driver (like ASIO4ALL's ASIOA4A.sys).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: batch fixes 2026-03-05 (#375)

* fix: use Playwright fill() instead of native value setter in search smoke test (ROK-692)

The native value setter + input event dispatch trick races with React's
reconciliation in CI, causing the controlled input to not pick up the
change. Playwright's fill() handles React controlled inputs correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: filter voice attendance classification to signed-up users only (ROK-707)

Non-signed-up users who briefly joined the voice channel were getting
voice session records classified as no_show, polluting attendance data.
Now classifyEvent() fetches the event's signup list and only classifies
sessions for signed-up users. Orphaned sessions for non-roster members
are deleted during classification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add visual artifacts to all 20 timeline nodes in /currents/

Each card now spawns a provocative artifact from its era ‚Äî real
public-domain photographs where the image is irreplaceable (Memex,
ENIAC women, Sketchpad, Engelbart mouse), CSS/SVG recreations where
the concept hits harder (Bauhaus grid, SAGE radar, Xerox desktop,
ChatGPT cursor), and interactive JS pieces (Vision Pro eye tracking,
live datacenter watt counter, Amazon friction loop).

Artifacts fade in 0.4s after card text with paradigm-aware treatments:
terminal era gets green CRT filters, GUI era gets warm shadows, all
respect prefers-reduced-motion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: feature flags not working client-side in account navigation

process.env[dynamicKey] doesn't work in client code (webpack only inlines
static refs). Created FeaturesProvider that passes server-evaluated features
via React context to client components. Account layout now uses useFeatures()
hook instead of directly importing the features object.

fix(dashboard): resolve user identity mismatch between internal API and Cognito login

Users created via internal API get synthetic cognitoId (internal-xxx). When the
same user logs in through Cognito/ALB, getCurrentUser() couldn't find them by
cognitoId and the create fallback hit a P2002 unique constraint on email. The
error handler then re-queried by cognitoId which still returned null.

Fix: Add email-based fallback lookup that updates the synthetic cognitoId to the
real Cognito one, unifying the user record. Also fix P2002 handler to check both
cognitoId and email.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: remove unsupported --json flag from gh pr create (#311)

`gh pr create` does not support the `--json` flag (unlike `gh pr view`
and `gh pr list`). This caused every draft PR creation to fail with
"unknown flag: --json". The code already had a fallback to parse the
PR URL from stdout, so the fix is to use URL parsing as the primary
path and keep JSON parsing as a future-compatibility fallback.

Closes #308

Co-authored-by: christrudelpw <chris@generacy.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 1: cinematic visual overhaul ‚Äî typography, colors, starfield

- Replace all terminal/pixel fonts with Space Grotesk across sections
- New color palette: #05060F bg, #4A9EFF accent, #F0F0F0 text
- Remove asteroid field, intel popup, HUD, shoot-hint from background
- Starfield updated to gentle omnidirectional drift (vx/vy per star)
- Remove NEBULAE, Asteroid/Bullet/Explosion (bg), INTEL_FACTS, showIntel
- Simplify main loop to clearRect ‚Üí updateStars ‚Üí drawStars
- Update all section styles: timeline, tx-cards, archive-cards, contact
- Remove neon glows and pixel fonts from forms, footer, mini-nav
- Arcade game styles preserved untouched

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add unit tests for CTA extraction, URL sanitization, CSS bg-images, font merge, extraction notes

47 tests covering all medium-impact and smaller pipeline improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add 217 unique SMIL-animated SVG thumbnails for all game cards

Each game gets a unique animation type (25 types) matched by keywords
in the game slug/description, with seeded PRNG variation per game.
Text centered at x=140 to fix cropping issue. Types include: dash,
pulse, bubbles, orbit, bounce, beam, catch, gravity, stack, burst,
circuit, spiral, drift, wave, and more.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix 8 security issues from staff review (#23-#30)

- #23: Add auth to test-smtp endpoint (CRITICAL SSRF fix)
- #24: Add status transition validation on campaign PUT
- #25: Replace listUsers() O(N) scans with direct lookups
- #26: Add Content-Security-Policy header
- #27: Replace in-memory rate limiter with Upstash Redis
- #28: Add 5MB size limit to CSV upload
- #29: Add OAuth email connection confirmation page
- #30: Sanitize console.error to not log sensitive token data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

harness: fix interactive session metadata and rerecord 031/032/033

- keylog_to_session.py: for interactive sessions set name/role/race/gender/align
  to null in options (chosen interactively, not preset) and tutorial to null
  (not forced off). Set regen.mode to manual-direct-live so JS test runner
  handles embedded chargen steps correctly.
- Rerecord seed031/032/033 with corrected metadata.

seed031 (Gerald Tourist): Dlvl:1->2->3->4, diverges at step 41 (dog_goal)
seed032 (Sarah Wizard): Dlvl:1->2->3, diverges at step 19 (trap missile)
seed033 (Paul Priest): Dlvl:1->Tutorial:1->Tutorial:2->Dlvl:2->3, diverges step 175

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  to visually separate it from the dark background
